items: Welcome by the School Board President

Oral Communication - If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on: (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd3rKbPfVCTpOsK5ILqjnU2u-h-NuNx-vUq4OZxYNVR8lc4aQ/viewform?usp=sf_link) prior to the Special Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
First of Two Public Hearings: School Attendance Boundary Change for Neighborhood Schools
Discussion of School Plan for Student Achievement
Adoption of Resolution 32, a Resolution of the Redwood City School District Calling for an Election to be Held on November 3, 2020 for the Election of 3 Members of the Governing Board

Approval of Permanently Renaming the 170 Selby Lane in Atherton site, currently on file with the California Department of Education as Selby Lane Elementary School, as Adelante Selby Spanish Immersion School

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Board agreed to create a third map option (Map 3) for school boundaries to be developed by a subcommittee of trustees (Dennis and Janet) before the scheduled vote. Original timeline was to finalize on June 24; revised timeline has public hearing on July 22 and final vote on July 29.
